name: INTIKHAB KHURSHEED
summary: I build modern web experiences with React, Angular, Node.js, and MongoDB, combining clean UI, scalable architecture, and thoughtful product decisions.
about: Full Stack Developer building production-ready web apps with the MERN stack and Angular. I have shipped healthcare platforms, task managers, dashboards, and enterprise tools with a focus on responsive UI, robust APIs, and fast iteration.
